description: A quality inspector needs to record the results of an in-process inspection for a work order.

nodes.task_description: Identify the work order and the specific inspection plan associated with it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly selects the work order and brings up the required inspection checklist.

nodes.task_description: Enter the measurements and pass/fail results for each characteristic on the checklist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent enters the data for all inspection points.

nodes.task_description: Submit the inspection results, noting that one measurement is out of specification.

expected_outcome.value: Agent submits the results, which automatically flags the batch for non-conformance.
